title: CBIC Mandates 2-Factor Authentication for Central Excise, SBS & HSNS Taxpayers
content:
# CBIC Mandates 2-Factor Authentication for Central Excise, SBS & HSNS Taxpayers

Ek important update hai. Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) ne Central Excise, Service Tax (SBS) aur HSNS Cess taxpayers ke liye Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) mandate kar diya hai.

*   **What is it?** Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) is an enhanced security measure. Ab aapko login credentials (User ID aur Password) ke saath-saath ek One Time Password (OTP) bhi enter karna hoga.
*   **Who does it apply to?** Yeh mandate Central Excise Taxpayers, Service Tax Taxpayers (under SBS), aur HSNS Cess Taxpayers par lagu hoga jab woh ACES-GST application mein login karenge.
*   **Why now?** CBIC ka aim hai ACES-GST application ki security ko strong karna. Isse taxpayer accounts aur unki sensitive information unauthorized access se secure rahengi.
*   **Effective Date:** Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) ka implementation 21st June 2026 se shuru ho chuka hai.
*   **Advisory Details:** Is mandate se related complete details aur step-by-step procedure Advisory No. 11/2026, dated 24th June 2026, mein di gayi hai.
*   **Action for Taxpayers:** Sabhi taxpayers ko yeh ensure karna hoga ki unke registered Mobile Number aur E-mail ID ACES-GST application mein current, active aur accessible hon, taaki OTPs without interruption receive ho saken.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Advisory here](https://www.cbic-gst.gov.in/pdf/AdvisoryNo_11_2026_2FA.pdf)

*Published on: 1 July 2026*
